zh.lifeSummary: 當Elizabeth Stanford於1465年出生在英國坎布利其爾維波爾時，她的父親John Stanford esquire43歲，母親Joan Boteler37歲。她於大約1485年與William Cornwallis Knight of the Bath在英國英格蘭素福爾可拉德斯頓結婚。他們至少是7個兒子和7個女兒的父母。她去世於1537年4月1日在英國素福爾可拉德斯頓享年72歲，埋葬在英國素福爾可拉德斯頓。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Elizabeth Stanford于1465年出生在英国坎布利其爾維波爾时，她的父亲John Stanford esquire43岁，母亲Joan Boteler37岁。她于大约1485年与William Cornwallis Knight of the Bath在英国英格兰素福爾可拉德斯頓结婚。他们至少是7个儿子和7个女儿的父母。她去世于1537年4月1日在英国素福爾可拉德斯頓享年72岁，埋葬在英国素福爾可拉德斯頓。

nameMeanings.name: Stanford
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from any of various places so called, including Stanford (Bedfordshire, Kent), Stanford Dingley and Stanford in the Vale (Berkshire), Stanford le Hope and Stanford Rivers (Essex), Stanford Bishop and Stanford Regis (Herefordshire), Stanford on Avon (Northamptonshire), Stanford on Soar (Nottinghamshire), and Stanford on Teme (Worcestershire); also from Stamford (Lincolnshire, Northumberland), Stamford Bridge (East Yorkshire), and Standford in Headley (Hampshire), all of which appear as Stanford in medieval documents. The placenames all derive from Old English stān ‘stone, rock’ + ford ‘ford’. This surname has been established in Ireland since the 16th century, where it is also found under the variant Stankard.

History: An early bearer of this surname in North America, Thomas Stanford of England, settled in Charlestown, MA, in the mid 17th century and started a family line that includes Leland Stanford (1824–93), the railroad developer who was governor of CA, a US senator, and the founding benefactor of Stanford University.

variants.name: Stanforth
meanings: mainly a variant of   Stanford  , which may have migrated to North Yorkshire and Northumberland from Norfolk and Suffolk by the North Sea coastal trade.

variants.name: Standford
meanings: English: variant, with intrusive -d-, of   Stanford  . Compare   Standiford  .

nameMeanings.name: Elizabeth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual spelling of   Elisabeth   in English. It is recorded in the medieval period, but was made popular by being borne by  Queen Elizabeth I  of England (  1533–1603 ). In the 20th century it again became extremely fashionable, partly because it was the name of  Elizabeth Bowes-Lyon  (  1900–2002 ), who in  1936  became Queen Elizabeth as the wife of King George VI, and after his death in  1952  achieved great public affection as Queen Mother for nearly half a century. Even more influentially, it is the name of her daughter  Queen Elizabeth II  (  b. 1926 ).

variants.name: Elisabeth
meanings: The spelling of Elizabeth used in the Authorized Version of the New Testament, and in most modern European languages. This was the name of the mother of John the Baptist (Luke 1:60). Etymologically, the name means ‘God is my oath’, and is therefore identical with Elisheba, the name of the wife of Aaron according to the genealogy at Exodus 6:23. The final element seems to have been altered by association with Hebrew shabbāth ‘Sabbath’.

en.lifeSummary: When Elizabeth Stanford was born in 1465, in Wimpole, Cambridgeshire, England, her father, John Stanford esquire, was 43 and her mother, Joan Boteler, was 37. She married William Cornwallis Knight of the Bath about 1485, in Thrandeston, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 7 sons and 7 daughters. She died on 1 April 1537, in Thrandeston, Suffolk, England, at the age of 72, and was buried in Thrandeston, Suffolk, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Elizabeth Stanford est née en 1465, à Wimpole, Cambridgeshire, Angleterre, son père, John Stanford esquire, avait 43 ans et sa mère, Joan Boteler, avait 37 ans. Elle a épousé William Cornwallis Knight of the Bath environ 1485, à Thrandeston, Suffolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 7 fils et 7 filles. Elle est décédée le 1 avril 1537, à Thrandeston, Suffolk, Angleterre, à l’âge de 72 ans, et a été enterrée à Thrandeston, Suffolk, Angleterre.

Sie hat um 1485 in Thrandeston, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom William Cornwallis Knight of the Bath geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 7 Söhne und 7 Töchter. Sie starb am 1. Lei sposato William Cornwallis Knight of the Bath circa 1485, nel Thrandeston, Suffolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 7 figli e 7 figlie. Morì il 1 aprile 1537, nel Thrandeston, Suffolk, England, all'età di 72 anni, e fu sepolta a Thrandeston, Suffolk, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Stanfordが1465年にイギリスカンブリジェシュアイアウィンプオルで生まれた時，父John Stanford esquireは43歳，母Joan Botelerは37歳であった。約1485年にイギリスイギリススフォルクスランデストンでWilliam Cornwallis Knight of the Bathと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも7人の息子と7人の娘の親であった。彼女は1537年4月1日にイギリススフォルクスランデストンで72歳で死去し，イギリススフォルクスランデストンにて埋葬された。

ko.Brome with Oakley, Suffolk, England, Uni: 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 브롬 위스 클리
ko.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Stanford(이)가 1465년 영국 캄브리지실르 위포일에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 John Stanford esquire(은)는 43세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Joan Boteler(은)는 37세였다. 그녀는 대략 1485년 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 스랜데스턴에서 William Cornwallis Knight of the Bath(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 일곱 명의 아들과 일곱 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1537년 4월 1일 영국 수폴크 스랜데스턴에서 72세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 수폴크 스랜데스턴에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Elizabeth Stanford nasceu em 1465, em Wimpole, Cambridgeshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, John Stanford esquire, tinha 43 anos e sua mãe, Joan Boteler, tinha 37 anos. Ela casou-se com William Cornwallis Knight of the Bath aproximadamente 1485, em Thrandeston, Suffolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 7 filhos e 7 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1 de abril de 1537, em Thrandeston, Suffolk, Inglaterra, com 72 anos, e foi sepultada em Thrandeston, Suffolk, Inglaterra.

ru.Brome with Oakley, Suffolk, England, Uni: бром вит оакли, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Elizabeth Stanford родилась в 1465 г. в местности вимпол, камбриджешир, Англия, её отцу по имени John Stanford esquire было 43 года, а матери, которую звали Joan Boteler, 37. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени William Cornwallis Knight of the Bath около 1485 г. в местности трандестон, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 7 сыновей и 7 дочерей. Она умерла 1 апреля 1537 г. в местности трандестон, суффолк, Англия в возрасте 72 лет и была похоронена в местности трандестон, суффолк, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Elizabeth Stanford nació en 1465, en Wimpole, Cambridgeshire, Inglaterra, su papá, John Stanford esquire, tenía 43 años y su mamá, Joan Boteler, tenía 37 años. Se casó con William Cornwallis Knight of the Bath aproximadamente 1485, en Thrandeston, Suffolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 7 hijos y 7 hijas. Murió el 1 de abril de 1537, en Thrandeston, Suffolk, Inglaterra, a la edad de 72 años, y fue sepultada en Thrandeston, Suffolk, Inglaterra.
